请编写一个迷宫自动化脚本 完成一个游戏中迷宫功能的自动运行
开始时确认在<div class="NavigationBar_navigationLink__3eAHA NavigationBar_active__3R-QS"><div class="NavigationBar_nav__3uuUl"><svg role="img" aria-label="navigationBar.labyrinth" class="Icon_icon__2LtL_ Icon_small__2bxvH" width="100%" height="100%"><use href="/static/media/misc_sprite.8d60624b.svg#labyrinth"></use></svg><div class="NavigationBar_contentContainer__1x6WS"><div class="NavigationBar_textContainer__7TdaI"><span class="NavigationBar_label__1uH-y">迷宫</span></div></div><div class="NavigationBar_badges__3D2s5"><div class="NavigationBar_badge__3I_xZ">5</div></div></div><div class="NavigationBar_subSkills__37qWb"></div></div>的迷宫页面
1.<div class="LabyrinthPanel_buttonsContainer__2oY1b"><div class="LabyrinthPanel_label__2p7tI">&nbsp;</div><button class="Button_button__1Fe9z Button_success__6d6kU Button_large__yIDVZ">进入迷宫</button></div> 点击这个进入迷宫
(可能发生的错误 : 迷宫次数不足 在<div class="LabyrinthPanel_chargeCount__1GDLP">入场券: 3 / 5</div> 查看 检查时要保证" / 5"必须要在 若不足 前往<div class="NavigationBar_navigationLink__3eAHA NavigationBar_active__3R-QS"><div class="NavigationBar_nav__3uuUl"><svg role="img" aria-label="navigationBar.settings" class="Icon_icon__2LtL_ Icon_small__2bxvH" width="100%" height="100%"><use href="/static/media/misc_sprite.8d60624b.svg#settings"></use></svg><div class="NavigationBar_contentContainer__1x6WS"><div class="NavigationBar_textContainer__7TdaI"><span class="NavigationBar_label__1uH-y">设置</span></div></div></div><div class="NavigationBar_subSkills__37qWb"></div></div> 中的<div class="SettingsPanel_value__2nsKD"><button class="Button_button__1Fe9z">补充入场券</button><span class="SettingsPanel_cooldownNote__2HXXY">(3小时冷却)</span></div> 点击补充入场券 补充每3h一次 若button不可点击 则等待后再补充 等待时会变成<div class="SettingsPanel_value__2nsKD"><button class="Button_button__1Fe9z Button_disabled__wCyIq">补充入场券</button>2h 59m 38s</div> 需要返回迷宫页面 （点击<div class="NavigationBar_navigationLink__3eAHA"><div class="NavigationBar_nav__3uuUl" aria-describedby=":rg:"><svg role="img" aria-label="navigationBar.labyrinth" class="Icon_icon__2LtL_ Icon_small__2bxvH" width="100%" height="100%"><use href="/static/media/misc_sprite.8d60624b.svg#labyrinth"></use></svg><div class="NavigationBar_contentContainer__1x6WS"><div class="NavigationBar_textContainer__7TdaI"><span class="NavigationBar_label__1uH-y">迷宫</span></div></div><div class="NavigationBar_badges__3D2s5"><div class="NavigationBar_badge__3I_xZ">5</div></div></div><div class="NavigationBar_subSkills__37qWb"></div></div>）继续操作)
2.进入迷宫后点击<button class="Button_button__1Fe9z Button_success__6d6kU">立即开始</button>开始迷宫 立即开始按钮会变化为<button class="Button_button__1Fe9z Button_warning__1-AMI">停止</button> 并开始检测迷宫状态
（状态栏在：<div class="Header_myActions__3rlBU"><div class="Header_currentAction__3IaOm"><div class="Header_actionName__31-L2"><div class="Header_icon__EvZqF"><svg role="img" aria-label="Icon" class="Icon_icon__2LtL_ Icon_tiny__nLKFY Icon_inline__1Idwv" width="100%" height="100%"><use href="/static/media/misc_sprite.8d60624b.svg#labyrinth"></use></svg></div><div class="Header_displayName__1hN09">迷宫 [∞]</div></div><div class="Header_secondaryInfo__1O1js"></div><div class="Header_progressBarAndButton__3yfVI"><div class="Header_progressBarContainer__2NXUU"><div class="ProgressBar_progressBar__Os8fm" style="--duration: 0;"><div class="ProgressBar_innerBarContainer__3WP-N"><div class="ProgressBar_innerBar__3Z_sf ProgressBar_active__Do7AF" style=""></div></div><div class="ProgressBar_text__102Yn"><span>自动化中...</span><span><div role="img" aria-label="Icon" class="Icon_icon__2LtL_ ActionProgressBar_hammi__3ueRn" style="background-image: url(&quot;data:image/gif;base64,&quot;);"></div></span></div></div></div><div class="Header_stopButtonContainer__3hHUk"><button class="Button_button__1Fe9z Button_warning__1-AMI Button_fullWidth__17pVU Button_small__3fqC7">停止</button></div></div><div class="Header_lootContainer__1nMaY"></div></div><div><div><div class="QueuedActions_queuedActions__2xerL">+248 队列<br>中的行动</div></div></div></div>） 状态检测默认为30分钟一次 可以通过ui调节
3.当状态栏不是迷宫且<button class="Button_button__1Fe9z Button_warning__1-AMI Button_disabled__wCyIq">结束迷宫</button>按钮可以被点击（可点击时为<button class="Button_button__1Fe9z Button_warning__1-AMI">结束迷宫</button>）点击这个结束迷宫 可能会先后跳出俩个弹窗（<div class="MuiPaper-root MuiPaper-elevation MuiPaper-rounded MuiPaper-elevation24 MuiDialog-paper MuiDialog-paperScrollPaper MuiDialog-paperWidthSm css-uhb5lp" role="dialog" aria-labelledby=":r5bi:"><div class="DialogModal_message__2utk_">确定要逃出迷宫吗？当前的迷宫将会结束。</div><div class="DialogModal_buttonsContainer__3r1pK"><div class="DialogModal_buttonContainer__2lIyK"><button class="Button_button__1Fe9z Button_fullWidth__17pVU">取消</button></div><div class="DialogModal_buttonContainer__2lIyK"><button class="Button_button__1Fe9z Button_success__6d6kU Button_fullWidth__17pVU">确定</button></div></div></div>和<div class="MuiPaper-root MuiPaper-elevation MuiPaper-rounded MuiPaper-elevation24 MuiDialog-paper MuiDialog-paperScrollPaper MuiDialog-paperWidthSm css-uhb5lp" role="dialog" aria-labelledby=":r5c5:"><div class="DialogModal_message__2utk_">你真的确定吗？你还有388个火把，可能还能继续探索。</div><div class="DialogModal_buttonsContainer__3r1pK"><div class="DialogModal_buttonContainer__2lIyK"><button class="Button_button__1Fe9z Button_fullWidth__17pVU">取消</button></div><div class="DialogModal_buttonContainer__2lIyK"><button class="Button_button__1Fe9z Button_success__6d6kU Button_fullWidth__17pVU">确定</button></div></div></div>）点击确定结束迷宫 返回主界面 重新开始1的部分


userscript.html?name=WMI-%25E6%2595%25B0%25E6%258D%25AE%25E5%258C%2585%25E5%2587%2580%25E5%258C%2596%25E5%2599%25A8-%25E4%25BB%2585-Hook.user.js&id=a5966bf5-9351-4b76-a282-0e2267f41236:16 [净化器] 已启动 - 正在监听 WebSocket 发送...

这是补充次数时抓到的包
